text:
In the first scene, I feel a sense of emptiness and anticipation. The space is open and quiet, yet structured, almost inviting something to happen or someone to arrive. The angled perspective makes the world seem slightly off-balance, prompting me to contemplate the underlying order versus chaos present in spaces.

In the second scene, vibrant colors and words on the wall stimulate my curiosity and creativity. The exhibition of research and design makes me feel inspired, as if I am standing at the intersection of human ingenuity and possible futures. Here, I sense possibility and connection, contrasting with the quiet expectation of the previous space.
